Event Manager Subscription

Manage your subscription and access premium event management features

Professional Plan

Full access to all event management tools

Rs.99 /month
Active

Renews: March 15, 2026

Your Event Manager Responsibilities

Event Planning & Coordination

Manage end-to-end event planning from concept to execution

Vendor & Staff Management

Coordinate with vendors, staff, and service providers

Ticketing & Registration

Handle ticket sales, registration, and attendee management

Analytics & Reporting

Track event performance and generate detailed reports

Customer Support

Provide support to attendees and handle inquiries

Available Subscription Plans

Basic

Rs.49/month
  • Up to 5 events per month
  • Basic analytics
  • Email support
  • Advanced features
CURRENT

Professional

Rs.99/month
  • Unlimited events
  • Advanced analytics
  • Priority support
  • All premium features

Enterprise

Rs.299/month
  • Everything in Pro
  • White-label options
  • Dedicated account manager
  • Custom integrations
